title: Hero: Theme
code:
<gds-card gap="0" flex-direction="row" shadow="l" width="max-content" border-radius="xl" variant="neutral-02-outlined" padding="s">
  <gds-theme color-scheme="light" design-version="2023">
    <gds-card variant="neutral-02-outlined" align="center" border-radius="m 0 0 m">
      <gds-icon-sun size="xl"></gds-icon-sun>
    </gds-card>
  </gds-theme>
  <gds-theme color-scheme="dark" design-version="2023">
    <gds-card variant="neutral-02" align="center" border-radius="0 m m 0">
      <gds-icon-moon size="xl"></gds-icon-moon>
    </gds-card>
  </gds-theme>
</gds-flex>
